The coil rotates at a constant angular velocity around an axis perpendicular to the magnetic field, generating a sinusoidal alternating current. As shown in the figure, this alternating current is applied to the input of an ideal transformer, and a small light bulb \( L \), with a rated voltage of 10V, lights up normally. The resistance of the coil and wires is negligible. Which of the following statements is correct?
